goal: Complete the 4P outer factory strategy even if intermediate local winrate drops
notes: Research branch. Unlike sample45, this intentionally routes most 4P boards into domain_factory and boosts regroup pressure toward the selected domain. The goal is to complete the outer-factory strategy first, then judge or tune after behavior exists.
